name: statsd-exporter
description: A lightweight Go service that bridges StatsD metrics to Prometheus exposition format, enabling teams to adopt Prometheus without rewriting existing StatsD instrumentation.

bullets.text: Implemented a UDP listener and tag-based metric translation with configurable mapping rules, sustaining 20,000 metrics/second on a single core.
Adopted by 3 internal teams at Apex Fintech to bridge legacy instrumentation into a shared Grafana/Prometheus stack.

name: pgmigrate
description: A minimal CLI tool for managing PostgreSQL schema migrations, designed for teams that want version-controlled SQL without a heavy ORM.

bullets.text: Supports forward and rollback migrations with a lock-based concurrency guard to prevent simultaneous deploys from corrupting schema state.
Used in production at Apex Fintech to manage 80+ migrations across 4 environments with zero downtime.
